base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of proto_and_jp_enemy_variants — a character (boss) from 1986 legend of zelda. '(JPN)' + '(Proto)' labels on sheet — Japan-only and prototype-cut-content variant sprites present in ROM but not in final NA retail release. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: '(JPN)' + '(Proto)' labels on sheet — Japan-only and prototype-cut-content variant sprites present in ROM but not in final NA retail release
